raw_consumer_statement: I was charged for 3 separate purchases each one I disputed monthly explaining I never requested these charges. I even asked for them to be banned so I wouldnt get charged they keep happening I am receiving no protection from fraudulent charges I cant even get them to give me new credit card either even though they accepted my last two disputes about it they havent even credited me back the fraudulent money I was charged I am over {$50.00} loss now going on over {$70.00} from another recent charge I still have to dispute again due to their inaction!
